name: having-nested-groups
description: 嵌套分组：AND(销售额超100万, OR(利润超20万, 数量不少于50))
code: const applyBuilder = (builder: VBIBuilder) => { builder.havingFilter.addGroup('and', outer => { outer.add('sales', n => n.setAggregate({"func":"sum"}).setOperator('gt').setValue(1000000)); outer.addGroup('or', inner => { inner.add('profit', n => n.setAggregate({"func":"sum"}).setOperator('gt').setValue(200000)); inner.add('amount', n => n.setAggregate({"func":"sum"}).setOperator('gte').setValue(50)); }); }); }
